task: Decoupled the Discord card gate from the call site and gated the 'done' ping on per-turn elapsed time rather than session total, with comprehensive test coverage.
discussion_summary: The askr voice notification system has been progressively hardened over recent sessions: emergency kill announcements, humanized spoken text, and now per-turn elapsed-time gating for the session-done ping. This session focused on refactoring the stop.py hook to decouple the Discord card's gate logic from its call site, fixing a datetime import issue, and adding test coverage for the new `_turn_elapsed_seconds` and `_speak_session_done` gating logic. All 25 voice tests pass; the full suite passes; changes committed and pushed.

accomplishments.what: Decoupled Discord card gate from call site in askr/hooks/stop.py
Added test coverage for _turn_elapsed_seconds and _speak_session_done gating logic in tests/test_voice.py
Verified all 25 voice tests pass and full test suite passes

next_actions.action: Review the per-turn elapsed-time gating behavior in production to confirm the 'done' ping fires at the right cadence and does not spam on long-running turns
next_actions.why: The new gating logic is now live; observing real-world behavior will validate the heuristic

next_actions.action: Consider adding metrics or logging to track how often the per-turn gate suppresses the 'done' ping vs. allows it
next_actions.why: Will help tune the elapsed-time threshold if needed and provide visibility into gate effectiveness

decisions.decision: Gate the session-done ping on per-turn elapsed time, not session total
decisions.reason: Prevents spam on long-running sessions by only speaking 'done' when a single turn has taken sufficient time

decisions.decision: Decouple the Discord card's gate logic from its call site
decisions.reason: Improves separation of concerns and makes the gating logic testable and reusable

relational_files.why: Contains the speak() function and voice notification logic that stop.py gates
Tests the voice notification system including the new per-turn gating logic
